name: blackgolem
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y strace ltrace procps lsof iproute2 less && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && grep -qxF 'alias claude="claude --dangerously-skip-permissions"' ~/.bashrc || echo 'alias claude="claude --dangerously-skip-permissions"' >> ~/.bashrc
